title: helianthemum scabrosum
intro: Helianthemum scabrosum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Helianthemum scabrosum is often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
